stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The figure provides different patterns of runway designators. What is the type of each pattern from A to D?

options.a: Non-compliant pattern, optional pattern, parallel pattern, general pattern.
options.b: General pattern, parallel pattern, optional pattern, non-compliant pattern.
options.c: General pattern, non-compliant pattern, parallel pattern, optional pattern.
options.d: Optional pattern, parallel pattern, non-compliant pattern, general pattern.
